caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain, 5-foot Seas Expected at St. Lucia
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing heavy tropical moisture with 88% rain probability, southeasterly winds up to 11 kt and seas near 5.2 ft with an east swell at a 7 s period affecting Castries. I advise Castries harbor operators and small craft to prepare for brief flooding, reduced visibility and gusty conditions; Grenada (St. George's) is reporting winds up to 13 kt with similarly choppy seas.

mediterranean.headline: Small Craft Conditions Near Mykonos; Moderate Seas Expected
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northeast winds of 24 kt with 5.2 ft seas and a 6 s NNE swell; rain less than 10% rain probability. I note Haifa is seeing lighter 12 kt winds, and I advise small vessels to exercise caution near Mykonos where winds reach Small Craft Advisory-level 24 kt and seas are choppy.
